hero.description: I build fast, modern web applications using React, TypeScript, Node.js and Python. I focus on clean code, great UX, and delivering on time. Currently available for freelance projects — let's build something great together.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I use in development

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Some of the projects I've developed to demonstrate my skills

aprendaAqui.title: Aprenda Aqui!
aprendaAqui.description: Gamified education platform for learning programming (HTML, CSS and JavaScript), inspired by Duolingo. Features interactive tracks, quiz and code lessons, integrated editor, XP and level system, leaderboard, virtual store, daily rewards and a full teacher panel for content creation.
features: Learning tracks with Duolingo-style visual path
Interactive quiz and code lessons with integrated editor
Gamification with XP, levels, streak and league-based ranking
Virtual store with gems, power-ups and editor themes
Reward chests, daily rewards and lives system
Teacher panel to create tracks, units and lessons
Community with friends, activity feed and notifications
aprendaAqui.challenges: Architect a full-stack monorepo with Next.js and Express API, implement a complete gamification system (XP, streak, levels, gems, store) and build a teacher panel with dynamic track CRUD — while keeping a fluid, engaging Duolingo-style experience.

fi.title: Personal Finance (Fi)
fi.description: Full-stack web app for personal financial control with an interactive dashboard, category budgets, goals and automatic recurring transactions. Features a gamified financial score, AI assistant (“Fi”) for spending analysis and complete authentication with password recovery.
features: Interactive dashboard with consolidated financial overview
Category budgets and financial goals
Automatic recurring transactions
Gamified financial score
AI assistant for spending analysis
Complete authentication with password recovery
fi.challenges: Build a robust full-stack application with JWT authentication, recurring transaction processing, AI integration for spending analysis and data visualizations that make financial control intuitive and engaging.

expenses.title: Construction Expense Management System
expenses.description: Full-stack web app that helps construction companies track and control project expenses in real time. Features an interactive dashboard with detailed reports, budget alerts and multi-user access.
features: Interactive dashboard with charts and metrics
Expense control by category and sector
User system with permissions
Exportable PDF reports
Responsive interface for mobile and desktop
expenses.challenges: Develop a robust system for construction financial management, implementing complex budget validations and creating intuitive data visualizations for engineers and managers.

unifit.title: UNIFIT
unifit.description: Landing page for a gym focused on conversion. Built with performance and mobile-first design in mind, featuring smooth animations and a clear call-to-action flow.
features: Mobile-first responsive layout
Smooth CSS animations and transitions
Clear call-to-action flow for lead conversion
Performance-optimized assets and loading
Modern visual design tailored for fitness brands
unifit.challenges: Balance visual impact with fast load times on mobile, and design a conversion-focused layout that guides visitors toward membership sign-up.

consultoria.title: Real Estate Consultancy
consultoria.description: Premium landing page for a luxury real estate consultancy, featuring an immersive hero, interactive property carousel, gallery modals and specialized services. Elegant design with serif typography, full mobile navigation and a validated contact form.
features: Full-screen hero with animated metrics and CTAs
Property carousel with modal gallery and keyboard navigation
Services section with informative modals
Contact form and newsletter with toast feedback
Responsive mobile menu with accessibility (ARIA)
Smooth scroll and viewport counter animations
consultoria.challenges: Build a premium visual experience with plain HTML, CSS and JavaScript, including accessible carousels, multi-image gallery modals and fluid mobile interactions — while maintaining performance and a sophisticated identity for the luxury segment.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's work together! Get in touch with me
contact.description: I'm always open to new opportunities and collaborations. If you have a project in mind or would like to discuss possibilities, don't hesitate to get in touch.
